registryRecords.userVisibleImpact: The runtime could not construct an extension record from the synthetic registry.
registryRecords.remediationHint: Refresh or rebuild the runtime extension registry before enabling extension discovery.

registryRecords.userVisibleImpact: Synthetic namespace metadata could not be resolved during maintenance.
registryRecords.remediationHint: Suppress repeated namespace lookups and emit a DiagnosticStormRecord until the namespace cache changes.

userVisibleSummary: Registry integrity is degraded because synthetic records are missing.
remediationHint: Run bounded registry repair or defer registry-dependent launch work until integrity is restored.
